title: Multicolor Airplane Glider Kits - Pack of 8 - Perfect Party Favors for Kids and Events
features: MULTICOLOR AIRPLANE GLIDER KITS: Unleash your child's imagination with our pack of 8 airplane gliders, designed to provide endless hours of playtime adventure and excitement. A perfect addition to any celebration for kids and aviation enthusiasts alike.

EASY ASSEMBLY & FLYING FUN: Simple snap-together assembly means less hassle and more fun! These gliders offer a balanced flight, soaring gracefully through the air - an excellent opportunity for children to learn about aerodynamics and enjoy outdoor play.

PERFECT PARTY FAVORS: Delight your party guests with our airplane gliders as favors for birthdays, gatherings, or any fun-filled event. Create memorable moments while encouraging a sense of discovery and creative play.

DURABLE AND HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Made with eco-friendly and lightweight foam material, these airplane glider kits are designed to withstand hours of play without losing their shape or color, ensuring long-lasting fun and entertainment for children of all ages.

IDEAL FOR GIFT FOR KIDS' PARTIES: Our airplane gliders are excellent gifts for children, providing them with an engaging activity to enjoy with friends. Turn any event into an unforgettable experience with these colorful and entertaining party favors.
description: Product Description Swoop into party fun with these Airplane Glider Party Favors. Contains 8, each of these easy-to-assemble gliders includes 3 foam parts: a plane body, middle wings, and rear wings. Pass out the airplane gliders for guests to put together for a quick party activity, or add the kits to goodie bags with other fun favors for airplane or military themed birthday. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 8 Airplane Glider Kits
